privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Blender scene with 4 programmatically-generated cube objects (Case_Bottom, Battery, Circuit_Board, Case_Top) at initial Z positions 0.0, 0.25, 0.45, and 0.6 respectively (initial vertical spread of 0.6 units). The agent must animate these objects to achieve a vertical spread of at least 3.6 units by Frame 48. The environment uses Blender 4.2.4 LTS with Cycles render engine at 1920x1080 resolution. Output files must be saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/exploded_view.blend and rendered to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/exploded_view.png (minimum 20KB).
